03 = Unable to get to and from the toilet or bedside commode but is able to use a bedpan/urinal independently.
04 = Is totally dependent in toileting. CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1845_CUR_TOILTG_HYGN M1845 Current Toileting Hygiene This field indicates the patient's current ability to maintain perineal hygiene safely. 00=Able to manage toileting hygiene and clothing management without assistance. 01 = Able to manage toileting hygiene and clothing
